reviews.review_description: Unfortunately i didn't understand what the hell i was looking at, but it looks a great tutorial. Hopefully more will be added to this free app

4/5 game.
I enjoyed the premise and thought it was well executed. Good interactability. The story mode was short but compelling. It’s also free, so definitely worth a download! 

That being said, I could only give it 4 stars for 3 main reasons.

1 - there’s not much replay value (maybe add a multiplayer mode?)

2 - it seemed kind of arbitrary if you had to press 
right or enter to move onto the next screen. I think more consistency would help new players a lot.

3 - the way the hands were shaded makes the bottoms darker at all times. This is a neat little shortcut to give realistic shading most of the time, but if you go palms up, it’s a bit immersion breaking.
I know that this is just a sample but I really like it. Please keep those coming great work. thank you very much to the developers. Great job 😊🙏
